tools.name: install_dependencies
tools.description: Install or update Shopware development dependencies. Use for first-time setup and after pulling code changes. Each flag is opt-in — all false means no action. Uses composer scripts internally (composer init:js for JS deps). If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

docker_service.description: Docker Compose service name (required for docker-compose environment)

compose_file.description: Path to docker-compose file (optional, defaults to docker-compose.yml)

composer.description: Install/update PHP dependencies via composer. Auto-detects install vs update based on lockfile presence.

administration.description: Install admin JS dependencies via composer npm:admin.

storefront.description: Install storefront JS dependencies via composer npm:storefront + bin/install-extension-npm.

tools.name: database_install
tools.description: Install Shopware database for the first time. Drops existing database, runs migrations, creates admin user and sales channel. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

tools.name: database_reset
tools.description: Wipe and rebuild database to a clean state. Same as database_install but intended for resetting an existing environment. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

tools.name: testdb_prepare
tools.description: Prepare the test database for integration tests. Runs migrations and initializes test fixtures. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

tools.name: frontend_build_admin
tools.description: Full Shopware Administration build chain: bundle:dump, feature:dump, framework:schema:dump, entity-schema-types, npm build, assets:install. Use this for complete builds. For quick iterative JS-only builds, use dev-tooling's vite_build instead. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

tools.name: frontend_build_storefront
tools.description: Full Shopware Storefront build chain: bundle:dump, feature:dump, npm production build, theme:compile, assets:install. Use this for complete builds. For quick iterative JS-only builds, use dev-tooling's webpack_build instead. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

tools.name: plugin_create
tools.description: Scaffold a new Shopware plugin and activate it. Creates plugin directory in custom/plugins/, refreshes plugin list, installs and activates the plugin. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.

tools.name: plugin_setup
tools.description: Register and activate an existing plugin from custom/plugins/. Refreshes plugin list and installs with activation. If a .mcp-php-tooling.json config exists, its environment settings override any arguments passed.

environment.description: Execution environment. Overridden by .mcp-php-tooling.json if present.
